name: Setup
description: Set up the TindaTap app so it is ready for your store.

name: Presyo
description: Check the SRP of certain items in a sari-sari store.

name: Barcode
description: Generate a barcode for items in the store that do not have one.

name: Sell Price
description: Generate a suggested selling price for an item.

name: Coster
description: Make recipes like lumpia and find the right price so you don’t lose money.

name: Signs
description: Download ready-made signs you can post in your physical store, such as 'Ice for Sale'.
